name: notes_demo
_comment: Coords below are window-relative (coordinate_space:'window'). Got them from `deskagent inspect --window <id>` during exploration. Pipeline runs `deskagent record` in the background and `deskagent control --target-window <id> --background` for the take, so the user can keep working in another app for the entire run.

setup.cmd: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "Notes" to set position of window 1 to {80, 80}'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "Notes" to set size of window 1 to {1440, 900}'

preflight.label: New Note
preflight._doc: deskagent inspect --window <id> --json | jq must contain a 'New Note' element

recording.text:
- Record launch video
- Cut Shorts version
- Write copy
- Schedule post
